name: nanomem-claude-code
description: Connect Claude Code to NanoMem long-term personal memory through hooks and read-only MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Read and capture long-term personal memory.
interface.longDescription: Adds NanoMem as a sidecar memory layer for Claude Code. Hooks inject relevant personal memory before a turn and capture user-visible dialogue after a turn. MCP exposes read-only memory lookup.
defaultPrompt: Recall my relevant personal preferences with NanoMem
